context: Evaluates the agent's ability to keep the free-text path open even when the user pre-names options, instead of treating the named set as exhaustive.

checklist.name: Named options presented with tradeoffs
checklist.description: Postgres, MySQL, and MongoDB are each presented with a short tradeoff or implication, not bare labels

checklist.name: Free-text path explicitly open
checklist.description: A fourth, open-ended path is explicitly offered alongside the three named options

checklist.name: Not framed as exhaustive
checklist.description: The three named options are not presented as the only possible answers
